segments.text: The theory of relativity, proposed by Albert Einstein, revolutionized our understanding of time and
, showing that these concepts are interwoven rather than separate. According to Einstein, time is not an absolute, but a relative measure that can be affected by
. This means that the stronger the gravitational field, the slower time
. For example, time runs slightly faster on a mountain than at sea level. This phenomenon has been confirmed through various experiments, including those that utilize atomic
. Understanding relativity is crucial for modern technologies such as GPS, which must account for these effects to provide accurate location

academic.passage: The study of artificial intelligence (AI) explores the development of systems that can perform tasks typically requiring human intelligence. Key areas of research include machine learning, natural language processing, and robotics. Machine learning enables systems to learn from data and improve over time, while natural language processing focuses on the interaction between computers and human language. Robotics integrates AI into machines to automate tasks. The implications of AI are profound, affecting industries ranging from healthcare to finance.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the study of artificial intelligence?
questions.explain: 本題的主要焦點在於人工智慧的系統開發，其目的是模擬人類智能的行為。

questions.q: Which area of AI involves the interaction between computers and human language?
questions.explain: 自然語言處理是涉及計算機與人類語言互動的領域。

questions.q: What can be inferred about the impact of AI on industries?
options: AI will have minimal effects on industries
AI will only benefit the technology sector
AI is not widely used in any industry
questions.explain: 從文本中可以推斷，人工智慧將對多個產業產生變革。

questions.q: What does the term 'machine learning' refer to in the context of AI?
questions.explain: 在人工智慧的背景下，機器學習指的是從數據中學習和改進的過程。

daily.passage: Attention all students: The campus library will be closed for maintenance this Saturday from 8 AM to 4 PM. Please plan accordingly and make sure to return any books by Friday. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

questions.q: When will the campus library be closed?
questions.explain: 根據公告，圖書館將在星期六關閉。

questions.q: What should students do before the library closes?
questions.explain: 學生應在星期五前歸還任何書籍，以免在圖書館關閉期間受到影響。
